data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding guardian approval.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Guardian approval requirements per service', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for guardian approval, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any successful creation or verification of such approval processes. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of guardian approval processes being validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify guardian approval requirements.
